issues.description: CheckoutPageContent.tsx is 222 lines and has multiple responsibilities: cart state reading, submission state machine per-seller, completed flag session storage management, and layout. The functions readCompletedCheckoutFlag, writeCompletedCheckoutFlag, and getCompletedCheckoutState are defined inside the file but are candidates for extraction to a domain utility. The component manages both UI orchestration and session persistence logic.
issues.fix: Extract the session storage helpers (readCompletedCheckoutFlag, writeCompletedCheckoutFlag, getCompletedCheckoutState) to a domain utility module like checkout/domain/checkoutSession.ts. This keeps the component focused on UI orchestration.

issues.description: AuditTable.tsx is 259 lines. While it is a table component, it appears to handle filtering, pagination display, and row rendering in a single component. Consider splitting row rendering to a separate AuditTableRow component to adhere to SRP.
issues.fix: Extract the row rendering logic to AuditTableRow.tsx. This follows the same pattern used in ProductTableRow.tsx in the studio app.

patterns.description: usePaymentMethodsManager hook correctly follows SRP - it encapsulates all data-fetching, mutations, and UI state for payment methods page in a single hook with clear responsibilities. Well-structured. Verified from new test file and source.
useAutoSavePaymentMethod correctly separates auto-save concerns (debounce, mutation) from PaymentMethodEditor UI state. stale closure fix via paymentMethodIdRef is correct and well-implemented.
patterns.verdict: COMPLIANT - no regression from BUG-003 fix
